commit.subject: LU-18616 kernel: update RHEL 9.5 [5.14.0-503.21.1.el9_5]
commit.message:
LU-18616 kernel: update RHEL 9.5 [5.14.0-503.21.1.el9_5]

Update RHEL 9.5 kernel to 5.14.0-503.21.1.el9_5.
